response.justification: Szabo brings strong software engineering fundamentals and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure through MCP work at re:cinq, plus proven staff-level leadership. However, the resume shows only 6 months of direct AI systems experience against the 8+ year requirement for production-grade solutions. Critical gaps include no demonstrated expertise with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM performance optimization, or Python—all explicitly required or key technologies. The recent career gap and lack of depth in AI-specific areas suggest he would require significant ramp-up time despite his solid general engineering background.
strengths: 20 years software engineering experience with recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at staff level
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives, mentor teams, and teach complex subjects; strong technical depth across multiple languages and platforms
Production-grade TypeScript/Node.js expertise with AWS CDK and microservices experience handling high-scale systems
concerns: Only 6 months of direct AI-agent system work vs 8+ year requirement; no evidence of shipping production-grade AI solutions at scale
No experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM performance metrics, or Python—all required or key technologies for the role
Recent career gap (7+ months) and three role changes in 5 years; limited portfolio demonstrating data pipeline or AI-infrastructure depth

key_factors.factor: Recent AI infrastructure work and staff-level background
Missing vector databases, RAG, and Python expertise
